title: Loops should not be infinite
description: Infinite loops that run indefinitely without proper termination conditions can cause applications to hang, consume excessive resources, and impact system performance. This rule detects common patterns of infinite loops such as empty for loops and while(true) constructs without proper break conditions.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Infinite for loop detected - add proper termination condition
Infinite while loop detected - add break condition or proper termination
Infinite do-while loop detected - add break condition or proper termination
